tasks.label: 📊 Run Data Collectors Once
tasks.command: cd backend && python -c "from collectors.stocks import collect_all_market_data; from collectors.crypto import collect_crypto; from collectors.news import collect_all_news; collect_all_market_data(); collect_crypto(); collect_all_news()"

tasks.label: 📱 Send Telegram Morning Summary
tasks.command: cd backend && python -c "import asyncio; from telegram_bot.bot import send_morning_summary; asyncio.run(send_morning_summary())"

tasks.label: 🗄️ Reset Database
tasks.command: cd backend && python -c "import os; os.remove('financial_data.db') if os.path.exists('financial_data.db') else None; from database import init_db; init_db(); print('Database reset!')"
